mod_pow(base, exp, Mod) ->
    case exp of
        0 -> 1;
        _ ->
            do_pow(base rem Mod, exp, Mod)
    end.

do_pow(Base, Exp, Mod) when Exp > 0 ->
    case Exp rem 2 of
        1 -> 
            Res = do_pow(Base * Base rem Mod, (Exp - 1) div 2, Mod),
            (Res * Base) rem Mod;
        _ -> 
            do_pow(Base * Base rem Mod, Exp div 2, Mod)
    end.

% calculate_V(A1, A0, M) computes Value(1^A1 0^A0) mod M
calculate_V(A1, A0, M) when A1 > 0 ->
    % V = (2^A1 - 1) * 2^A0 mod M
    
    % 1. Calculate 2^A1 mod M
    TwoPowA1 = mod_pow(2, A1, M),
    
    % 2. Calculate (2^A1 - 1) mod M
    PrefixValue = (TwoPowA1 - 1 + M) mod M,
    
    % 3. Calculate 2^A0 mod M
    TwoPowA0 = mod_pow(2, A0, M),
    
    % 4. Combine
    V = (PrefixValue * TwoPowA0) mod M,
    V;
calculate_V(_, _ , _) -> 0. % If A1 = 0, the value is 0.

solve(Nums1, Nums0) ->
    M = 1000000007,
    
    % 1. Form segments: [{A1, A0}, ...]
    Segments = [{A1, A0} || [A1, A0] <- zip(Nums1, Nums0)],
    
    % 2. Sort segments using the greedy criterion: 
    % Prioritize higher A1 (descending), then lower A0 (ascending).
    SortedSegments = lists:sort(Segments, fun({A1A, A0A}, {A1B, A0B}) ->
        case A1A of
            A1A when A1A > A1B -> -1;
            A1A when A1A < A1B -> 1;
            _ -> 
                % A1A == A1B. Compare A0 (ascending order preferred)
                case A0A of
                    A0A when A0A < A0B -> -1;
                    A0A when A0A > A0B -> 1;
                    _ -> 0
                end
        end
    end),
    
    % 3. Calculate the final value iteratively
    R = 0,
    
    FinalResult = lists:foldl(fun({A1, A0}, CurrentR) ->
        L = A1 + A0,
        
        % Calculate V_i (Value of the current segment)
        Vi = calculate_V(A1, A0, M),
        
        % Calculate 2^L mod M (Shift factor)
        TwoPowL = mod_pow(2, L, M),
        
        % Update R: R_new = (R_old * 2^L + Vi) mod M
        ShiftedR = (CurrentR * TwoPowL) mod M,
        (ShiftedR + Vi) mod M
    end, R, SortedSegments),
    
    FinalResult.
```

mod_pow(base, exp, Mod) ->
    case exp of
        0 -> 1;
        _ ->
            do_pow(base rem Mod, exp, Mod)
    end.

do_pow(Base, Exp, Mod) when Exp > 0 ->
    case Exp rem 2 of
        1 -> 
            Res = do_pow(Base * Base rem Mod, (Exp - 1) div 2, Mod),
            (Res * Base) rem Mod;
        _ -> 
            do_pow(Base * Base rem Mod, Exp div 2, Mod)
    end.

% calculate_V(A1, A0, M) computes Value(1^A1 0^A0) mod M
calculate_V(A1, A0, M) when A1 > 0 ->
    % V = (2^A1 - 1) * 2^A0 mod M
    
    % 1. Calculate 2^A1 mod M
    TwoPowA1 = mod_pow(2, A1, M),
    
    % 2. Calculate (2^A1 - 1) mod M
    PrefixValue = (TwoPowA1 - 1 + M) mod M,
    
    % 3. Calculate 2^A0 mod M
    TwoPowA0 = mod_pow(2, A0, M),
    
    % 4. Combine
    V = (PrefixValue * TwoPowA0) mod M,
    V;
calculate_V(_, _ , _) -> 0. % If A1 = 0, the value is 0.

solve(Nums1, Nums0) ->
    M = 1000000007,
    
    % 1. Form segments: [{A1, A0}, ...]
    Segments = [{A1, A0} || [A1, A0] <- zip(Nums1, Nums0)],
    
    % 2. Sort segments using the greedy criterion: 
    % Prioritize higher A1 (descending), then lower A0 (ascending).
    SortedSegments = lists:sort(Segments, fun({A1A, A0A}, {A1B, A0B}) ->
        case A1A of
            A1A when A1A > A1B -> -1;
            A1A when A1A < A1B -> 1;
            _ -> 
                % A1A == A1B. Compare A0 (ascending order preferred)
                case A0A of
                    A0A when A0A < A0B -> -1;
                    A0A when A0A > A0B -> 1;
                    _ -> 0
                end
        end
    end),
    
    % 3. Calculate the final value iteratively
    R = 0,
    
    FinalResult = lists:foldl(fun({A1, A0}, CurrentR) ->
        L = A1 + A0,
        
        % Calculate V_i (Value of the current segment)
        Vi = calculate_V(A1, A0, M),
        
        % Calculate 2^L mod M (Shift factor)
        TwoPowL = mod_pow(2, L, M),
        
        % Update R: R_new = (R_old * 2^L + Vi) mod M
        ShiftedR = (CurrentR * TwoPowL) mod M,
        (ShiftedR + Vi) mod M
    end, R, SortedSegments),
    
    FinalResult.

%% Helper function for modular exponentiation: (base^exp) mod mod
power(base, exp, mod) ->
    power_aux(base, exp, mod, 1).

power_aux(base, 0, _, result) ->
    result;
power_aux(base, exp, mod, result) ->
    case rem(exp, 2) of
        1 ->
            NewBase = rem(base * base, mod),
            NewResult = rem(result * base, mod),
            RemainingExp = (exp - 1) div 2,
            power_aux(NewBase, RemainingExp, mod, NewResult);
        _ ->
            NewBase = rem(base * base, mod),
            RemainingExp = exp div 2,
            power_aux(NewBase, RemainingExp, mod, result)
    end.

solve(nums1, nums0) ->
    % M = 10^9 + 7
    M = 1000000007,

    % 1. Prepare segments: list of {a1, a0}
    Segments = [
        {A1, A0}
        || A1 <- nums1, A0 <- nums0
    ],

    % 2. Sorting: Sort based on (-a1, a0) to achieve a1 descending, a0 ascending.
    % We sort the list of tuples {a1, a0}
    SortedSegments = lists:sort(fun({A1, A0}, {B1, B0}) ->
        % Compare -A1 vs -B1 (which is B1 vs A1)
        Case1 = A1 - B1,
        case Case1 of
            > 0 -> -1; % A1 > B1, A comes first
            < 0 -> 1;  % A1 < B1, B comes first
            _ -> % A1 == B1
                % Compare A0 vs B0
                A0 - B0 % A0 < B0 means A comes first (-1)
        end

    % We want descending A1, ascending A0.
    % Custom comparison function (A, B) -> Result:
    % Result < 0 means A comes before B.
    % Result > 0 means B comes before A.

    % {A1, A0} vs {B1, B0}
    SortFn = fun({A1, A0}, {B1, B0}) ->
        if A1 /= B1 ->

            true -> 1;
